title: Add real-time workplan progress tracking to monitor

phases.title: Add progress tracking to hex-nexus API

tasks.title: Add GET /api/workplan/{id}/status endpoint in hex-nexus/src/routes/workplan.rs that returns current phase, task, progress (completed/total), and last update timestamp
Update sched task result field to include workplan progress JSON with phase_id, task_id, completed_count, total_count fields when status is in_progress

phases.title: Update hex monitor to show progress

tasks.title: Add In Progress section to hex monitor that shows running workplans with 'task X/Y: <current task title>' and progress bar (e.g., [====>    ] 40%)
Add hex workplan status <id> command that shows detailed progress: phase, task, elapsed time, estimated remaining (based on avg task time)
